comment: Full auto-cut from 19 vision windows. SHIFT=0s (except first-of-pack gap>10s). 112 segments.

segments.note: Pack-rip moment: first Chrome foil pack held readable, then torn open (wrapper peels, white card stack slides out). Feature/rip beat; start at slide-up so the rip plays after the cut.
Second sealed Chrome pack raised and presented: slides up into frame, held high/centered/readable to camera before being taken down to rip. Start at the slide-up.
Pack 1 cards slid out of wrapper, fronts fanned and held readable (pack-open reveal, flowing)
Chrome parallel (red tab) slides up, examined, then swapped to chrome player card; fronts readable (flowing swap)
Blue vertical card slides up centered, then continuous in-hand swapping of remaining pack-1 fronts (flowing fan)
Last pack-1 cards flipped front-up once more before being set down
Pack 2 cards slid out of wrapper, fronts fanned and held readable (pack-open reveal, flowing)
Pack 2 cards held front-up and fanned to end of window (flowing)
Card slides up from bottom (~147.7), held & shown center - first clear reveal of the window.

New card pushed up (~158.5), settles ~158.9, held steady (gold/white player card) then starts to lower - flowing reveal+hold. | Continuous in-hand fan: dark chrome card rises from low (~162.6), then a yellow/gold-bordered insert/feature card comes up (~166.5) - kept as one flowing segment so it doesn't blink.

Continuous in-hand showing of the next several cards (white/silver player cards swapped in hand) - flowing segment. | Continuous showing including an orange/colored parallel that comes up (~177.6) and following chrome cards - flowing. | Continuous showing of dark chrome cards plus a bright-bordered card - flowing fan/swap. | Continuous showing of final cards including a red parallel (~190.4); ends when hands go empty/no card on screen.
pack 1 rip: hands grab dark foil pack and tear it open (rip moment)
cards pulled out of pack 1, pack-art card + first cards fanned in hand (flowing)

red/orange parallel card slides up into hand, held high and readable (flows into fan) | continuous in-hand fan/swap of pack-1 cards: red card re-gripped, red-top B card brought up (flowing) | yellow/gold-bottom card held high, readable (continuation of fan)
silver big-B logo Bowman base card slides up, held centered
purple/holo parallel player card shown then silver B re-shown, continuous in-hand swap (flowing)
pack 2 rip: new foil pack opened, pack-art card emerges (rip moment) | cards pulled from pack 2 and fanned/separated in hand (flowing) | sepia/cream player base card slides up, held high and readable
light cream player card re-gripped, then dark premium/insert card revealed and held (flowing; likely a hit)
silver/holo refractor player card (red corner accents) slides up, held high
sepia/cream player card with red accents held high, readable
Pack-rip moment: final tear of the foil wrapper, green card emerging from pack | First card reveal: green base/parallel slides up and is held centered (sits still long after)
Red/white card slides up into frame, held centered and readable
Purple parallel/refractor slides up, held centered (colored parallel)
Continuous fan: multiple colored parallels/refractors (purple, gold, blue) swapped in-hand — one flowing segment, not chopped
Purple parallel settles and is held very steady/centered — distinct feature reveal
Pack-rip moment: next foil pack torn open | Purple 'P' parallel slides up out of the pack, held centered and readable
Gold/yellow refractor parallel slides up, held centered
White refractor card with player (red accents) slides up, held centered and readable
Final card: yellow/gold-top parallel slides up, held centered before reaching for next
Pack-rip moment: hands grab pack and tear the wrapper open, cards inside revealed (dynamic ~2s).
Card 1 slides up from bottom: first card pulled from the pack (colored refractor/parallel), held centered.
Card 2 slides up: white-jersey parallel (later flipped to show its colored/refractor front) — slide-start at 370.5.
Feature chrome card slides up: shiny silver chrome card with yellow tab, the standout of this pack (examined at length) — ~2s hit hold.
Distinct player card brought to center: white-jersey player with red logo and yellow bottom border, readable.
Insert/hit slides up: 'MS 5' silver insert card, held high and readable — ~2s feature hold.
Window opens mid-hold: white checklist/paper cards held up steady and readable in left hand (carryover from prior pack).
Gold/orange 'MS' chrome refractor slides up from bottom and settles centered; creator held it ~8s so it's a feature card -> ~2s hold.
Continuous in-hand flow: a checklist card is shown then a fan of chrome player refractors (purple/yellow) is swapped in hand without putting down -> one flowing segment, ends as hand lowers.
Second gold 'MS' chrome refractor slides up and settles centered; again held very long by creator -> feature ~2s hold.

Final beat: magenta/purple chrome refractor player card slides up into hand and is shown/turned, held to window end. | Continuous fan/swap already in motion at window start: cards held high and shuffled, collapsing into one shown card. One flowing segment, ends as the card lowers before the next slide-up.

Card A (purple/white player base/refractor) slides up from bottom and is held centered, readable. | Card B (orange/white player) slides up and is held centered, readable; capped at ~2.5s (static over-hold after this trimmed).
GLORY gold insert (feature/hit) slides up and is held centered; given the longer feature hold. Held even longer on tape but trimmed to cap.
Card C (white/silver player) slides up and is held centered, readable. After this the mat goes to sorting/empty/pack-handling dead time through end of window.
pack-rip: foil pack/wrapper raised and held up to camera before opening
first card of pack slides up — orange player base/parallel, held centered
blue/grey chrome player card slides up, settled and readable
hit: teal/purple refractor card revealed and admired
hit: dark/gold ornate insert card raised and held
rainbow/prismatic refractor card slides up briefly near window end
card 1: chrome base, player on green/grass bg, first card pulled from pack
card 2: colored parallel, player in red on green refractor bg
card 3: chrome base, player in orange/white uniform, from freshly opened pack
card 4: chrome base, player in white/grey uniform
card 5: big silver/white B-logo Bowman design card
card 6: colored parallel, player in dark/maroon uniform
fan (clipped left): cards spread in-hand partly off the LEFT edge of frame, one flowing segment, re-crop later
pack-rip: Bowman Chrome pack held and torn open in frame
card 1 chrome base slides up from wrapper, held high & centered (silver/B back)

continuous in-hand show/swap of the stack: base then colored parallels (blue, gold, red) and sparkly refractors thumbed one after another without setting down, ending with a fan spread partly off the LEFT edge of frame (fan clipped left) before being lowered
pack-rip: hands grip and tear the pack, cards burst out (pack-rip moment)
red-jersey player card #1 settles into hand, held readable (long-held feature card)
white/light player card #2 up in hand, examined
dark parallel player card #3 held in hand
colorful refractor parallels fanned/swapped in hand (flowing)
red player card #4 settles in hand, held readable
continuous fan: card swaps into colorful/purple refractor parallels, shuffled in hand before set down (flowing)
pack-rip moment: orange Bowman wrapper/sealed cards shown at top, then torn open

first base card slides up (orange/white player), then continuous in-hand fan/swap of several Bowman base cards | FEATURE: dark yellow/gold parallel slides up and is held long & centered (the showcase card of this window)
second yellow/gold parallel (different player) slides up after the first is lowered
orange/white base card slides up, held centered/readable

silver/chrome base card slides up, held centered | orange/white base card slides up; held and lightly swapped in-hand (flowing) | orange/white base cards re-raised and fanned/swapped continuously to end of window (flowing) | Orange/silver player card already held high at window start (slide-start precedes window); centered and readable
Purple/colorful parallel slides UP from bottom, then continuous in-hand swap into a pink/orange refractor held high; flowing multi-card swap, no blink
Light pink/white Bowman card slides up and is held centered/readable
Vivid sunset/rainbow refractor (standout card) slides up and is held high; feature hold
Pack-rip: new Bowman Chrome foil pack brought in and torn open
Silver/gray card with red marks rotated up and presented flat, centered and readable
New white/silver player card swapped up in-hand and held high
Orange/colorful refractor card slides up and is held centered
Continuous in-hand fan/shuffle of several cards (orange/white/colorful spread); flowing fan, kept as one segment
Dark green-tinted foil/chrome card raised and briefly held high, readable
sealed Bowman pack lifted up and shown centered (pack-rip moment) before opening
colorful refractor/parallel cards from the opened pack brought up and swapped in-hand, continuous fan
blue/silver chrome card slides up and is held high, readable, then flipped/inspected (same card)
GOLD GLORY insert (hit) slides up and is held high, longer hold for the feature card
silver chrome vertical player card slides up and settles on display
B-logo chrome base card already held centered & readable at window start (revealed pre-window, no in-window slide); brief representative hold
pack-rip moment: colorful Bowman wrapper slides up into frame and is torn open
first chrome card pulled from wrapper, slides up from bottom and settles centered (purple accent)
swap to 2nd chrome card (purple accent): prior card lowered, new card slides up and is held
swap to silver/white B chrome card: slides up from low-left and held centered
swap to orange/red parallel card (number 40 visible): slides up as silver card lowers, held centered
final card: silver chrome player card slides up from below and held centered & readable to window end

Chrome card (dark figure, white-B jersey) already held up at window start; swapped in-hand to its red checklist back, then re-shown. Continuous in-hand handling, flowing (no slide-start within window).
Green-dot parallel chrome card slides up from the wrapper into hand (~1026.8) and is held centered/readable. Long static hold afterward trimmed.
Next chrome card slides up into hand and is held centered.
Chrome card slides up into hand, held centered/readable. | White-bordered chrome card slides up (held ~5.7s in source); kept ~2.2s, rest of static hold dropped.
White-bordered photo/refractor card slides up into hand, held centered.
Ornate white insert (orange dot, looks like a feature/hit) slides up into hand; longer ~2s hold.
White photo card slides up into hand, held centered/readable.
Card slides up then several white cards handled/fanned in-hand continuously; flowing segment, ends before empty-mat dead time.
Final ornate/photo card (orange dot) picked up and held centered/readable before window ends in empty mat.
Pack-rip: next sealed Bowman pack lifted into frame top-right and shown before opening
Card A reveal - red-accent chrome card slides up into hand, held and shown | Card B reveal - gold/yellow parallel slides up (in-hand swap right after card A)
Card C reveal - white-jersey player base card slides up after brief lowering
Card D reveal - orange-accent card slides up, held vertical
Card E reveal - refractor/parallel slides up, examined in-hand
Pack-rip: following sealed pack lifted into frame and shown (after empty-mat gap)
Card F reveal - dark player chrome card slides up out of the opened pack
Feature card reveal - dark player card with red accents slides up and is admired/held long (likely the hit); held to window end
Carryover card already held high/center & readable at window open (slide began before WIN_START); held then lowered ~1164.3.

Feature/hit hold: red+multicolor refractor slides up ~1165.3, settles ~1166.2, then continuously held and turned in-hand (one flowing examination) through ~1180.0 — no intermediate slide-up to cut on.

Continuous in-hand swap: white-jersey player card swapped in ~1180.4, then white logo/checklist card ~1181.9 held steady through ~1187.5; no empty frame between, so one flowing segment. | Final reveal of window: colorful refractor (player in red) slides in ~1187.6, settles ~1188.1, held centered & readable to window end.
